name: Contractor Occupational Illness Coverage

mainEntity.name: Do independent contractors get occupational illness benefits in Farmington?
mainEntity.text: Do independent contractors get occupational illness benefits in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Farmington independent contractors denied unless misclassified employee; prove via control test.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah examines 20 factors for status. Gig workers in construction win reclassification. Insurers audit 1099s; Centerville attorneys litigate status hearings.[5]

description: Farmington independent contractors denied unless misclassified employee; prove via control test.[5]
